'''Paaerduags''', whose actual name was unpronounceable in [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Galactic Basic Standard]], were symbionts that consisted of a large, [[Color/Legends|yellowish]], hunchbacked, two-[[Limb/Legends|legged]] creature with a small green, four-[[Eye/Legends|eyed]] creature sprouting out of its back. Much of the [[Language/Legends|language]], including the true name of their [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]], was not pronounceable or comprehensible by non-Paaerduag, for one required two [[Mouth/Legends|mouths]] and four [[Ear/Legends|ears]] to truly speak and hear it. The green head communicated with non-Paaerduag, as the sounds produced by the other could not be heard by most species. Their homeworld was [[Sorjus]], a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] far off the [[Perlemian Trade Route/Legends|Perlemian Trade Route]].

At birth, the two [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] components were separate beings, which as they grew up, fused together. It seems the larger creature controlled movement as the smaller creature would tell it to turn around so it could see things opposite itself. Paaerduags were seen often around the time of the [[Jedi Civil War]], and [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] encountered two Paaerduags during his travels; one named [[Ja'Gatcha]], who was trapped on [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] due to the [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith]] quarantine and was likely [[Death/Legends|killed]] when [[Darth Malak]]'s [[Sith armada (Jedi Civil War)|fleet]] [[Destruction of Taris|bombarded]] the surface from [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]]. Another was named [[Mic'tunan'jus Orgu]], a [[Merchant/Legends|merchant]] in [[Anchorhead/Legends|Anchorhead]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].
